citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:07 PM on
2/26/2026. The inspector was able to reach the licensee by the primary contact phone number. The licensee was at a
doctor's appointment and no other available adults on premise were available for a kennel inspection at that time.
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:07 PM on 
2/26/2026. The inspector was able to reach the licensee by the primary contact phone number. The licensee was at a 
doctor's appointment and no other available adults on premise were available for a kennel inspection at that time. 
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. 
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
